response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and valuable entrepreneurial background through his startup, he lacks the necessary Director-level leadership and deep, recognized AI expertise required for this strategic role. His exposure to AI appears limited to his most recent position, which falls short of the advanced strategic advisory and AI-powered product differentiation expected of a Principal Engineer in AI Strategy.
strengths: Exceeds the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience across diverse tech stacks.
Demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform (GISCollective).
Strong track record of technical community engagement through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks Director-level or Principal engineering experience, having primarily held Senior and Staff roles.
AI expertise is not deeply established; lacks the preferred advanced AI degree and long-term recognized AI product development.
No demonstrated experience advising strategic enterprise customers on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption.
